"E:\Program Files (x86)\CMake\cmake-3.30.2-windows-x86_64\bin\cmake.exe" -E rm -f CMakeFiles\TestPlugin.dir/objects.a
C:\Users\user\.utils\llvm-mingw\bin\llvm-ar.exe qc CMakeFiles\TestPlugin.dir/objects.a @CMakeFiles\TestPlugin.dir\objects1.rsp
C:\Users\user\.utils\llvm-mingw\bin\clang++.exe -g -shared -o test_plugin.dll -Wl,--out-implib,libtest_plugin.dll.a -Wl,--major-image-version,0,--minor-image-version,0 -Wl,--whole-archive CMakeFiles\TestPlugin.dir/objects.a -Wl,--no-whole-archive @CMakeFiles\TestPlugin.dir\linkLibs.rsp
